tasks.label: Generate Certior PlanInfo (basic)
args: set -euo pipefail; cd "${workspaceFolder}"; mkdir -p .dap; lake exe plan-export --decl basic --out .dap/planInfo.generated.json

tasks.label: Generate Certior PlanInfo (hipaa)
args: set -euo pipefail; cd "${workspaceFolder}"; mkdir -p .dap; lake exe plan-export --decl hipaa --out .dap/hipaa.planInfo.json

tasks.label: Generate Certior PlanInfo (sox)
args: set -euo pipefail; cd "${workspaceFolder}"; mkdir -p .dap; lake exe plan-export --decl sox --out .dap/sox.planInfo.json

tasks.label: Certior: Run Lean Tests
args: set -euo pipefail; cd "${workspaceFolder}"; lake exe plan-tests
